retry_reason: Failure indicates either no matching entry exists in the list or the entry's refcount was zero (object dying). Retrying without a change in the list or object state is unlikely to succeed.
contract_summary: RCU-protected get-wrapper that finds a batadv_neigh_ifinfo associated with a given outgoing interface in the neighbor's ifinfo_list and acquires a reference via kref_get_unless_zero. The caller receives the referenced ifinfo (or NULL if not found or dying). The caller must check the return value and later release the reference with a corresponding put (e.g., batadv_neigh_ifinfo_put). The function does not modify the list or any other state; it only increments the refcount while under RCU read lock.
